title: Bowlump
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
[[File:Bowlumppic.jpg|thumb]]
A '''bowlump''' was a hairy, [[Shellfish/Legends|mollusk]]-like predator native to the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. These creatures could shoot down prey from overhanging branches with well-placed jets of [[Water/Legends|water]]. The bowlump was able to unhook its stalk from the muddy shallows and move slowly through the water by using its water jet for propulsion. Bowlumps were eaten by [[Blarth/Legends|blarths]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']]
